title: Blurple Coloured Blocks
description: A simple mod adding Blurple coloured blocks.
body:
## Ever wanted Blurple blocks?

**Well this mod does that!**

Currently it only has **Concrete** but the following blocks are in the works:
- Wool
- Carpet
- Terracotta
- Concrete Powder
- Stained Glass / Stained Glass Pane
- Shulker Box
- Bed
- Candle
- Banners
- Seats (from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric))
- Ornaments (from [Macaw's Holidays](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-holidays))
- Illuminant Block (from [Simply Light](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-light))

Every block has three variants:
- Bloiple *(#3a2ca4)*
- Dark Bloiple *(#140047)*
- Light Bloiple *(#6260de)*

The mod ID is `blurpleconcrete` as it was originally meant to just be concrete.

All blocks are marked with 'Bloiple' and not 'Blurple'.

**Please don't ask about ports to other versions of Minecraft.** If you know how to mod and
would like to port the mod to other versions, feel free to [open a pull request on the Github](https://github.com/valbuildr/blurple-concrete-mod/compare).
